Title: Welcome the week at The Ext Siargao (@the_ext_siargao) with their live bands fro
Details: Welcome the week at The Ext Siargao (@the_ext_siargao) with their live bands from 9 PM while enjoying their beers and cocktails from 6PM onwards.

Title: Looking for the perfect Tuesday night hangout? Head to Barbosa (@barbosa_siargao
Details: Looking for the perfect Tuesday night hangout? Head to Barbosa (@barbosa_siargao) for their Disco Tropico DJ set that will keep you dancing until midnight! They also have a Happy Hour BOGO promo from 5:30-7:30PM.

Title: Looking for a vibrant atmosphere and funky beats? Check out Goodies ( @goodies
Details: Looking for a vibrant atmosphere and funky beats? Check out Goodies ( @goodies.siargao ), where local and international DJs bring the party starting at 9PM.

Title: Dance the night away with Mama Coco’s Reggaeton Nights (@mamacoco
Details: Dance the night away with Mama Coco’s Reggaeton Nights (@mamacoco.siargao)! Mama Coco welcomes you from 6 PM to 12 midnight, featuring happy hour specials from 6 to 8 PM.

Title: Get ready to enjoy local beers and cocktails at Siargao Bed and Brew ( @siargaob
Details: Get ready to enjoy local beers and cocktails at Siargao Bed and Brew ( @siargaobedandbrew ), then hit the dance floor as the music starts at 8PM.

Title: Are you looking for a wild weekend? Mama Coco is your go-to spot for House/Techn
Details: Are you looking for a wild weekend? Mama Coco is your go-to spot for House/Techno beats, while El Lobo ( @ellobo_ph ) will have you dancing to the latest hits, and Barbosa will be serving some Melodic and Acid House. The party starts at 9PM.

Title: Looking for an unforgettable party experience? Don’t miss Harana’s ( @haranasurf
Details: Looking for an unforgettable party experience? Don’t miss Harana’s ( @haranasurf ) “Sabado Nights” with live music, unique acts, and more. The party runs from 9PM to 12 midnight.

Title: Get ready for a night of fun at Happiness Siargao’s weekly night market ( @happi
Details: Get ready for a night of fun at Happiness Siargao’s weekly night market ( @happinessphsiargao ). Join the festivities from 6PM onwards for delicious food, shopping, refreshing drinks, and fun dancing.

Title: Siargao Beach Club ( @siargao_beachclub ) and Sibol ( @sibol
Details: Siargao Beach Club ( @siargao_beachclub ) and Sibol ( @sibol.siargao ) are great spots for socializing every night and enjoying music or dancing with newfound friends. These places always have something exciting happening, so check them out.
